0.q: Both Na+/H+ and Li+/H+ antiporter activities were measured in membrane vesicles from E. coli KNabc carrying K1-nhaD or K2-nhaD, while no Na+/H+ or Li+/H+ antiporter activities were detected in those from E. coli KNabc carrying blank vector.

1.q: Both Na+/H+ and Li+/H+ antiporter activities were measured in membrane vesicles from E. coli KNabc carrying K1-nhaD or K2-nhaD, while no Na+/H+ or Li+/H+ antiporter activities were detected in those from E. coli KNabc carrying blank vector.

2.q: K1-NhaD and K2-NhaD have 75.5% identity at the predicted amino acid sequence.
